blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,916 ft. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds.
